<?php namespace Illuminate\View\Compilers\Concerns; trait CompilesFragments { /** * The last compiled fragment. * * @var string */ protected $lastFragment; /** * Compile the fragment statements into valid PHP. * * @param string $expression * @return string */ protected function compileFragment($expression) { $this->lastFragment = trim($expression, "()'\" "); return "<?php \$__env->startFragment{$expression}; ?>"; } /** * Compile the end-fragment statements into valid PHP. * * @return string */ protected function compileEndfragment() { return '<?php echo $__env->stopFragment(); ?>'; } }
